item.title: Data Recovery Software for Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Software for Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Software for Free
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com provides reasonable priced Data Recovery Software for Free that offers you all technically advanced functionality to get back entire misplaced files or documents due to partitioning error, worm attack, power failure, human error, logical crash in disk, accidentally deletion, reformat of memory card, software error, damaged of hard disk, improper system shutdown or pen drive is pulled out suddenly while operating with device with your minimal time and efforts. Fully featured data restoration utility allows user to rescue permanently deleted database records, files, pictures, audio, video files and memorable snaps from damaged data storage device or corrupted flash media without affecting the originality of data. Comprehensive Data Recovery Software for Free offers affordable way to instantly regain permanently lost digital pictures and data in smaller amount of time. Outstanding Data Recovery Software for Free recaptures virus infected or damaged files having different formats like mp3, mp4, zip, txt, html, xls, jpg, jpeg, tiff, bmp, bitmap and many more in most affordable and convenient way without doing much efforts. Most innovative data retrieval program assists user in getting back their lost personal folders from all capacity storage media easily. Advanced Data Recovery Software for Free is designed with real time GUI environment that facilitates all category of users like technical, non technical, home user, novice user, end user or others to make fully utilization of its functions without facing any kind of p[problem or taking any special training. Professional data rescue utility rapidly restores entire corrupted files and folders due to worm attack or hard disk failure. Features:* Well functional Data Recovery Software for Free empowers you to salvage lost data as it is.* Data Recovery Software does not require any expert guidance to use it.* Data restoration program successfully runs on all major Windows operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
Data Recovery Software for Free
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com provides reasonable priced Data Recovery Software for Free that offers you all technically advanced functionality to get back entire misplaced files or documents due to partitioning error, worm attack, power failure, human error, logical crash in disk, accidentally deletion, reformat of memory card, software error, damaged of hard disk, improper system shutdown or pen drive is pulled out suddenly while operating with device with your minimal time and efforts. Fully featured data restoration utility allows user to rescue permanently deleted database records, files, pictures, audio, video files and memorable snaps from damaged data storage device or corrupted flash media without affecting the originality of data. Comprehensive Data Recovery Software for Free offers affordable way to instantly regain permanently lost digital pictures and data in smaller amount of time. Outstanding Data Recovery Software for Free recaptures virus infected or damaged files having different formats like mp3, mp4, zip, txt, html, xls, jpg, jpeg, tiff, bmp, bitmap and many more in most affordable and convenient way without doing much efforts. Advanced Data Recovery Software for Free is designed with real time GUI environment that facilitates all category of users like technical, non technical, home user, novice user, end user or others to make fully utilization of its functions without facing any kind of p[problem or taking any special training. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
Data Recovery Software for Free
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com provides reasonable priced Data Recovery Software for Free that offers you all technically advanced functionality to get back entire misplaced files or documents due to partitioning error, worm attack, power failure, human error, logical crash in disk, accidentally deletion, reformat of memory card, software error, damaged of hard disk, improper system shutdown or pen drive is pulled out suddenly while operating with device with your minimal time and efforts. Fully featured data restoration utility allows user to rescue permanently deleted database records, files, pictures, audio, video files and memorable snaps from damaged data storage device or corrupted flash media without affecting the originality of data. Comprehensive Data Recovery Software for Free offers affordable way to instantly regain permanently lost digital pictures and data in smaller amount of time. Outstanding Data Recovery Software for Free recaptures virus infected or damaged files having different formats like mp3, mp4, zip, txt, html, xls, jpg, jpeg, tiff, bmp, bitmap and many more in most affordable and convenient way without doing much efforts. Most innovative data retrieval program assists user in getting back their lost personal folders from all capacity storage media easily. Advanced Data Recovery Software for Free is designed with real time GUI environment that facilitates all category of users like technical, non technical, home user, novice user, end user or others to make fully utilization of its functions without facing any kind of p[problem or taking any special training. Professional data rescue utility rapidly restores entire corrupted files and folders due to worm attack or hard disk failure. Features:* Well functional Data Recovery Software for Free empowers you to salvage lost data as it is.* Data Recovery Software does not require any expert guidance to use it.* Data restoration program successfully runs on all major Windows operating system.

[read more]

item.title: MSI to EXE Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:title: MSI to EXE Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:author: setupcreator
item.itunes:summary:
MSI to EXE Converter Software
(File Management)
MSI to exe installer setup package builder utility create executable .EXE files from Microsoft Installer.MSI format. Totally professional and easy to use setup creator build exe installation package from Windows installer MSI format with fully customized user friendly GUI interface. Setup creator tool generate executable (.exe) files by using the original Microsoft installer (.MSI) files format. MSI to exe converter application tool provide facility to save convert exe at user specified location. EXE installation setup converter program create and maintain the originality of MSI package even after the conversion into exe setup package using .NET framework installer. MSI to EXE setup creator program do not require any prior technical knowledge. The exe setup maker application also provides facility to convert default Microsoft Visual Studio.NET framework MSI installation setup packages to equivalent and similar exe installer format. MSI installer to exe installation setup converter is powerful, reliable, and cost effective solution to create executable file form Windows installer MSI file format. MSI to exe installer package builder software support to different versions of Windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Features: * Easily convert Windows installer file to executable file format. * Setup converter utility helps you to build exe files using MSI installation setup wizard. * Easy and user friendly single click MSI to EXE setup creator program and do not require any prior technical knowledge. * MSI to exe setup maker is a professional solution to converting Window installer to exe setup package. * Facility to save the convert exe file at user specified location. * Original .MSI file format, functionality and structure of your application remains unchanged.

[read more]
item.description:
MSI to EXE Converter Software
(File Management)
MSI to exe installer setup package builder utility create executable .EXE files from Microsoft Installer.MSI format. Totally professional and easy to use setup creator build exe installation package from Windows installer MSI format with fully customized user friendly GUI interface. Setup creator tool generate executable (.exe) files by using the original Microsoft installer (.MSI) files format. MSI to exe converter application tool provide facility to save convert exe at user specified location. EXE installation setup converter program create and maintain the originality of MSI package even after the conversion into exe setup package using .NET framework installer. MSI to EXE setup creator program do not require any prior technical knowledge. The exe setup maker application also provides facility to convert default Microsoft Visual Studio.NET framework MSI installation setup packages to equivalent and similar exe installer format. MSI installer to exe installation setup converter is powerful, reliable, and cost effective solution to create executable file form Windows installer MSI file format. MSI to exe installer package builder software support to different versions of Windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Features: * Easily convert Windows installer file to executable file format. * Setup converter utility helps you to build exe files using MSI installation setup wizard. * Easy and user friendly single click MSI to EXE setup creator program and do not require any prior technical knowledge. * MSI to exe setup maker is a professional solution to converting Window installer to exe setup package. * Facility to save the convert exe file at user specified location. * Original .MSI file format, functionality and structure of your application remains unchanged.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MSI to EXE Converter Software
(File Management)
MSI to exe installer setup package builder utility create executable .EXE files from Microsoft Installer.MSI format. Totally professional and easy to use setup creator build exe installation package from Windows installer MSI format with fully customized user friendly GUI interface. Setup creator tool generate executable (.exe) files by using the original Microsoft installer (.MSI) files format. MSI to exe converter application tool provide facility to save convert exe at user specified location. EXE installation setup converter program create and maintain the originality of MSI package even after the conversion into exe setup package using .NET framework installer. MSI to EXE setup creator program do not require any prior technical knowledge. The exe setup maker application also provides facility to convert default Microsoft Visual Studio.NET framework MSI installation setup packages to equivalent and similar exe installer format. MSI installer to exe installation setup converter is powerful, reliable, and cost effective solution to create executable file form Windows installer MSI file format. MSI to exe installer package builder software support to different versions of Windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Features: * Easily convert Windows installer file to executable file format. * Setup converter utility helps you to build exe files using MSI installation setup wizard. * Easy and user friendly single click MSI to EXE setup creator program and do not require any prior technical knowledge. * MSI to exe setup maker is a professional solution to converting Window installer to exe setup package. * Facility to save the convert exe file at user specified location. * Original .MSI file format, functionality and structure of your application remains unchanged.

item.title: 90 Fps unlocker Module [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: 90 Fps unlocker Module [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: ankan005
item.itunes:summary:
90 Fps unlocker Module
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
It's a magisk module to unlock 90 fps. It support various games.
Well there are many module present at a time but trust me try this one , this will give you good hardcore performance.
[read more]

item.title: Recover Photos Digital Camera [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Photos Digital Camera [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Photos Digital Camera
(Utilities)
Digital camera lost picture recovery software revives audio, video clips, still image, photo, snap and other multimedia documents from memory card of digital camera. Digital camera missing photo restoration application recovers data even drive not formatted or drive not detected message is displayed on computer screen while accessing digital camera. Digital camera crashed picture salvage program is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. Digital camera erased image rescue utility restores data even camcorder device is virus infected. Digital camera damaged video retrieval tool is easy to install and fast utility. Digital camera deleted snapshot recovery application is user friendly with all type of digital camera brand names including Samsung, Canon, Nikon and Toshiba. Digital camera erased snaps salvage wizard performs in-depth scanning of memory card of digital camera and stores that recovered data at user specified location. Digital camera crashed photo recovery software renovates missing data even data is deleted due to improper shutdown of digital camera. Digital camera damaged picture salvage application provides user friendly graphical user interface. Digital camera corrupted data rescue tool revives data even some reasonable error is occurred while using camcorder device.Features:* Digital camera lost image recovery software restores all missing files and folders within few minutes without any error.* Digital camera deleted photo restoration utility revives crashed data even digital camera is formatted or virus infected. * Digital camera erased picture retrieval program is easy to set up and fast tool.* Digital camera damaged snap salvage wizard completes in-detail checking of memory card of camera and shows preview of recovered data to user.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Photos Digital Camera
(Utilities)
Digital camera lost picture recovery software revives audio, video clips, still image, photo, snap and other multimedia documents from memory card of digital camera. Digital camera missing photo restoration application recovers data even drive not formatted or drive not detected message is displayed on computer screen while accessing digital camera. Digital camera crashed picture salvage program is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. Digital camera erased image rescue utility restores data even camcorder device is virus infected. Digital camera damaged video retrieval tool is easy to install and fast utility. Digital camera deleted snapshot recovery application is user friendly with all type of digital camera brand names including Samsung, Canon, Nikon and Toshiba. Digital camera erased snaps salvage wizard performs in-depth scanning of memory card of digital camera and stores that recovered data at user specified location. Digital camera crashed photo recovery software renovates missing data even data is deleted due to improper shutdown of digital camera. Digital camera damaged picture salvage application provides user friendly graphical user interface. Digital camera corrupted data rescue tool revives data even some reasonable error is occurred while using camcorder device.Features:* Digital camera lost image recovery software restores all missing files and folders within few minutes without any error.* Digital camera deleted photo restoration utility revives crashed data even digital camera is formatted or virus infected. * Digital camera erased picture retrieval program is easy to set up and fast tool.* Digital camera damaged snap salvage wizard completes in-detail checking of memory card of camera and shows preview of recovered data to user.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover Photos Digital Camera
(Utilities)
Digital camera lost picture recovery software revives audio, video clips, still image, photo, snap and other multimedia documents from memory card of digital camera. Digital camera missing photo restoration application recovers data even drive not formatted or drive not detected message is displayed on computer screen while accessing digital camera. Digital camera crashed picture salvage program is compatible with all Windows operating system including Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. Digital camera erased image rescue utility restores data even camcorder device is virus infected. Digital camera damaged video retrieval tool is easy to install and fast utility. Digital camera deleted snapshot recovery application is user friendly with all type of digital camera brand names including Samsung, Canon, Nikon and Toshiba. Digital camera erased snaps salvage wizard performs in-depth scanning of memory card of digital camera and stores that recovered data at user specified location. Digital camera crashed photo recovery software renovates missing data even data is deleted due to improper shutdown of digital camera. Digital camera damaged picture salvage application provides user friendly graphical user interface. Digital camera corrupted data rescue tool revives data even some reasonable error is occurred while using camcorder device.Features:* Digital camera lost image recovery software restores all missing files and folders within few minutes without any error.* Digital camera deleted photo restoration utility revives crashed data even digital camera is formatted or virus infected. * Digital camera erased picture retrieval program is easy to set up and fast tool.* Digital camera damaged snap salvage wizard completes in-detail checking of memory card of camera and shows preview of recovered data to user.

[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
Repository for OpenSuSE Tumbleweed
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.6
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.5
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.4
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.4/home:wusel1007.repo

Use:
- sudo zypper addrepo "Path to Repo"
- sudo zypper refresh

[read more]

item.title: qdvd [Video Apps]
item.itunes:title: qdvd [Video Apps]
item.itunes:author: tkbj
item.itunes:summary:
qdvd
(Video Apps)
qdvd is a GUI frontend for dvdauthor written in Qt5 (video DVD creator)
https://sourceforge.net/projects/qdvd
https://software.opensuse.org/package/qdvdauthor
http://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:/tkb/

https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=qdvdauthor
https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=libffmpeg063
https://software.opensuse.org//download.html?project=home%3Atkb&package=ffmpeg063-libs

QDVDAuthor has been translated to Qt6 (version 2.4.1)
[read more]
